   route to: one.one.one.one
destination: default
       mask: default
    gateway: 192.168.6.1
  interface: en7
      flags: <UP,GATEWAY,DONE,STATIC,PRCLONING,GLOBAL>

       0         0         0         0         0         0      1500         0
